summary: Solid foundation with good structure and tested core workflows. Unit tests thoroughly cover version bumping, commit classification, and file I/O. Integration tests properly validate execution through act with three bump scenarios (patch/minor/major). However, coverage is uneven: Read-CommitFixture and New-ChangelogEntry each have only 1 test despite being critical for changelog generation; missing tests for edge cases (unicode/special chars, very large version numbers, malformed fixtures); workflow tests couple 3 cases in BeforeAll reducing independence; fixture files referenced but contents unverified. Error scenarios in workflow context untested. Would catch regressions in main paths but has gaps in edge case handling.
